name: Brightcove
description: Brightcove — online video platform for broadcasting, marketing, and enterprise

seo.title: Brightcove — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Brightcove: Brightcove — online video platform for broadcasting, marketing, and enterprise

when_to_use: Enterprise video hosting with multi-DRM and secure delivery
Live streaming with broadcast-quality CDN for media companies
Customizable HTML5 video player with API-driven playlists
Video CMS for marketing teams publishing to web and social
Monetized video platform with ad insertion and paywall support

pros: Global CDN with proven scale for live events
cons: Pricing among the highest in the category
Player UI feels dated compared to JW or Mux
Long sales cycle required before any trial
Complex admin console with legacy surfaces
review.verdict: Enterprise OVP workhorse — powerful but expensive and showing its age versus modern API-first rivals.
review.best_for: Media companies and Fortune 500 needing monetized video at scale with procurement-friendly vendor.
review.not_for: Startups or dev teams wanting Mux-style API simplicity.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
